note: Initial seed — top picks across all four sections, last ~30–60 days. Daily 24-hour runs start tomorrow.

items.title: Ableton Live 12.4 ships with Link Audio and Push/Move overhaul
items.summary: Public release May 5. Link Audio sync, MIDI mapping for Push, expanded Delay LFO modes, and tighter Move workflow.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.7 launches alongside Claude Design
items.summary: Frontier Claude with stronger long-running coding and higher-resolution vision. Paired with Claude Design for prototypes and slides.

items.title: TouchDesigner 2025.32820 lands, POPs reshape 3D workflow
items.summary: Latest 2025-cycle build. New Point Operators (Text, Trace, Triangulate) shift 3D work onto a high-performance node family.

items.title: Midjourney V8 Alpha ships, V8.1 already in preview
items.summary: V8 launched March 17 with ~5x faster generation, native 2K via --hd, and better text rendering. V8.1 already in preview.

items.title: MUTEK Montréal 2026 announces full lineup, Aug 25–30
items.summary: 120 artists from 28 countries, 80+ live AV performances, plus a public installation village in Quartier des Spectacles.

items.title: Hugging Face ships ml-intern: agent that runs LLM post-training
items.summary: Open-source agent that reads papers, picks datasets, runs training, iterates. Reportedly beats Claude Code on a scientific-reasoning benchmark.

items.title: OpenAI shuts down the Sora app, API to follow in September
items.summary: Standalone Sora retired April 26. Compute costs and falling usage cited. Sora 2 Pro continues inside aggregator platforms.

items.title: "Neverness To Everness" launch ignites AI-art controversy in 24 hours
items.summary: Game shipped April 29 amid allegations of AI-generated assets. Hotta Studio silent. The workflow-vs-final-output question recurs.
